title: Cinematic Friendship & Travel Memory Experience Platform

requirements.text: Implement a hardcoded authentication system for exactly 6 members stored in the Motoko backend. Each user has: id, name, email, hashed password, and role (admin or member). On successful login, the frontend displays an animated typewriter text: 'Welcome back, Memory Keeper.' using a cinematic fade + typewriter animation.

quotes: Login access only for 6 members
Role-based admin panel
After login show animated typewriter text: 'Welcome back, Memory Keeper.'

acceptanceCriteria: Only 6 pre-seeded user accounts can log in
Users have a role field: 'admin' or 'member'
After successful login, a typewriter animation displays 'Welcome back, Memory Keeper.' on screen
Incorrect credentials show an error state
Session persists across page refreshes using local storage or React context

requirements.text: Create a cinematic landing/intro page that fades in from a fully black screen, then displays a typewriter-animated introductory text: 'Some moments were never meant to be forgotten…' in gold (#FFD700). Enable a custom golden glowing cursor throughout the entire site (cursor glow: rgba(255,215,0,0.6)).

quotes: Screen fades from black
Typewriter cinematic intro text: 'Some moments were never meant to be forgotten…'
Golden glowing cursor enabled

acceptanceCriteria: Page opens with a full black screen that fades in
Typewriter effect animates the intro text character by character
A custom gold-glowing cursor replaces the default cursor site-wide
After intro animation completes, user is transitioned to the main Memory Wheel view
Animation uses Framer Motion for page fade and a typewriter utility for text

requirements.text: Build the Memory Wheel as the main feature: a circular wheel UI with memory photos placed along its border. The wheel rotates on scroll using animation (simulated GSAP-style via CSS transforms + React state). When a photo aligns at the center position: the page background transitions dynamically to match that memory's scene type, and the photo becomes clickable to unlock the memory.

quotes: Circular wheel containing memory photos on border
Scroll to rotate wheel using GSAP
When photo aligns at center: background changes dynamically, click unlocks memory

acceptanceCriteria: Memory photos are arranged in a circular layout
Scrolling rotates the wheel, cycling through photos
The centered photo is visually highlighted (scale/glow)
Background gradient changes based on the centered memory's type
Clicking the centered photo triggers the Memory Unlock Animation

requirements.text: Implement the Memory Unlock Animation sequence triggered on clicking a memory photo: (1) screen fades to black, (2) heartbeat pulse transition effect, (3) photo zooms in with a Three.js 3D depth/parallax effect rendered in a canvas, (4) voice narration audio plays (from stored URL), (5) subtitle text appears with a cinematic slide-up animation, (6) handwritten-style overlay text appears on the image using a cursive font with a drawing-in animation.

quotes: screen fades to black
heartbeat transition
photo zooms in (3D depth using Three.js)
voice narration plays
subtitle appears with cinematic animation
handwritten overlay text appears on image

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking a memory triggers a full black screen fade
A heartbeat pulse animation plays before the photo appears
The photo is rendered in a Three.js canvas with 3D zoom/depth effect
Voice narration audio auto-plays from the memory's voice_note_url
Subtitle text animates in from below with cinematic timing
Handwritten overlay text appears on the photo with a draw-in cursive animation

requirements.text: Apply dynamic background scenes based on memory location/type field: memories tagged as 'beach' or trip photos display a beach blur gradient background; memories tagged as 'college' display a campus-themed blur background; memories tagged as 'night' display a dark cinematic tone background. These backgrounds animate on transition.

quotes: Trip Photo → Beach blur gradient
College Photo → Campus blur
Night Photo → Dark cinematic tone

acceptanceCriteria: Each memory has a scene_type field used to select background
Beach type shows a warm ocean gradient with blur
College type shows a muted campus-toned background
Night type shows a deep dark cinematic black/indigo tone
Background transitions smoothly using Framer Motion when memory changes

requirements.text: Implement a mode toggle allowing users to switch between Wheel Mode and Timeline Mode. In Timeline Mode, memories are displayed in a vertical scrollable timeline sorted by year, with scroll-triggered animations revealing each memory card year by year using Framer Motion intersection observer.

quotes: Switch between: Wheel Mode, Timeline Mode
Timeline scroll should animate memories year-wise

acceptanceCriteria: A toggle button switches between Wheel Mode and Timeline Mode
Timeline Mode shows memories grouped and sorted by year
Each year section and memory card animates in on scroll
Transition between modes uses a smooth page/component transition
Both modes are accessible on mobile and desktop

requirements.text: Build a Travel Map Mode showing a stylized SVG map of India with three clickable location markers: Vizag, Goa, and Bangalore. Clicking a location marker filters and displays memory cards related to that location in a side panel or modal with cinematic entrance animation.

quotes: India map with clickable locations
Vizag, Goa, Bangalore
Clicking location shows related memories

acceptanceCriteria: A stylized SVG India map is rendered with gold marker pins at Vizag, Goa, and Bangalore
Clicking a location pin filters memories by that location
Filtered memories appear in an animated panel/modal
Map markers glow gold on hover
Map view is accessible via main navigation

requirements.text: Implement Secret Memory Unlock logic: track how many memories have been viewed and how many times the wheel has been fully rotated (5 rotations). When all regular memories are viewed OR the wheel is rotated 5 times, unlock and reveal a hidden special memory with a distinct 'secret revealed' cinematic animation (e.g., golden particle burst + special typewriter message).

quotes: Unlock hidden memory when: all memories viewed OR wheel rotated 5 times

acceptanceCriteria: Backend tracks a 'secret' flag on one memory record
Frontend tracks viewed memory IDs in state/local storage
Frontend counts wheel rotation cycles
Secret memory is unlocked when condition is met and stored in user session
A cinematic reveal animation (particle burst + typewriter) triggers on unlock

requirements.text: Build an Admin Panel accessible only to users with the 'admin' role. The panel allows: uploading a photo (stored as URL), uploading a voice note (stored as URL), adding story text, adding subtitle text, setting year, setting location, marking a memory as special. All fields map to the Memories data structure in the Motoko backend.

quotes: Admin can: Upload photo, Upload voice note, Add story text, Add subtitle, Set year, Set location, Mark as special memory

acceptanceCriteria: Admin panel route is protected and only accessible to admin-role users
Form includes fields for all memory attributes
Submitting the form calls a backend create/update function
Photo and voice note URLs are stored as text fields (no binary upload required)
Admin can mark a memory as 'special' via a toggle
Existing memories are listed with edit/delete options

requirements.text: Create a cinematic Ending Page that triggers after all memories have been viewed. It displays: a full black screen, ambient piano audio plays (from a stored asset URL), the following lines appear one by one with cinematic typewriter animation: 'From strangers… to stories.' / 'From days… to memories.' / 'Our journey continues…', then a group photo asset fades in slowly from black.

quotes: After viewing all memories: Black screen + piano sound
'From strangers… to stories.'
'From days… to memories.'
'Our journey continues…'
Then group photo fades in slowly

acceptanceCriteria: Ending page is triggered when all memories are marked as viewed
Full black background with ambient piano audio autoplay
Three text lines appear sequentially with typewriter animation and delays
A group photo asset fades in slowly after text sequence completes
Page transition uses Framer Motion full-screen fade

requirements.text: Implement the Memories data model in the Motoko backend as a stable array/map of Memory records, each containing: memory_id, photo_url, voice_note_url, story_text, subtitle, location, year, special_memory (Bool), scene_type, and is_secret (Bool). Expose CRUD query/update functions: getMemories, getMemoryById, createMemory (admin), updateMemory (admin), deleteMemory (admin), and markMemoryViewed.

quotes: Memories: memory_id, photo_url, voice_note_url, story_text, subtitle, location, year, special_memory

acceptanceCriteria: Memory type defined with all required fields in Motoko
getMemories returns all non-secret memories for authenticated users
createMemory is restricted to admin callers
updateMemory and deleteMemory are restricted to admin callers
markMemoryViewed tracks viewed state per user session
Secret memory only returned via a dedicated unlockSecret function when conditions are met

requirements.text: Apply global cinematic UI polish: matte black (#0A0A0A) background throughout, all accent text/borders/glows use gold (#FFD700) with glow rgba(255,215,0,0.6). Include: parallax scroll effect on memory cards, particle effects (golden floating particles) exclusive to special memories, ripple animation on all click interactions, page fade transitions between all routes, and consistent golden border/shadow on all cards and interactive elements. Ensure full responsive layout for mobile and desktop.

quotes: Use golden glow effects on cursor, text, and borders
Include parallax scroll, particle effect (only for special memories), typewriter effect, handwriting effect, ripple click animation and page fade transitions
Make website responsive for mobile and desktop

acceptanceCriteria: Global background is #0A0A0A on all pages
All primary interactive elements use #FFD700 color with glow effect
Special memory cards render golden particle effects
All route changes use Framer Motion full-page fade transition
Click interactions show a ripple animation originating from click point
Parallax depth effect applied to memory cards on scroll
Layout is fully responsive with mobile-first breakpoints

constraints: Backend must be implemented in Motoko as a single actor (no Python Flask, no PostgreSQL — platform constraint)
Do not use external databases; all state must be persisted in Motoko stable variables
No real binary file upload — photo_url and voice_note_url are stored as text URLs
Authentication must not use external providers; use custom credential validation in Motoko
Immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components) must not be modified
nonGoals: Real-time WebSocket features or live collaboration
External cloud storage integration (AWS S3, etc.)
Mobile app (React Native) — web responsive only
Third-party payment or social login integration
GPS or real geolocation services — map is decorative SVG only

required: Matte black cinematic hero background with subtle golden light rays and film grain texture (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Golden glowing circular memory wheel frame with ornate border detail on transparent background (wheel-frame.dim_800x800.png)
Stylized minimal SVG-style India map silhouette with gold outline on dark background, marker dots at Vizag, Goa, and Bangalore (india-map.dim_600x800.png)
Cinematic ending screen background — deep black with soft golden bokeh light particles (ending-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
Golden particle/sparkle sprite sheet for special memory effect (particle-sprite.dim_256x256.png)
Placeholder group photo silhouette — soft sepia-toned cinematic style, group of friends, blurred warm tones (group-photo.dim_1200x675.png)
